Title: Voice DNA Extractor: Sound Like You, Not AI
Teaser: Reverse-engineers your real writing voice from past posts into a reusable persona block so every future draft sounds like you, not a chatbot.
PromptHint: Paste 3-5 of your best past posts where [PAST POSTS] is. Add your field for sharper results.
Prompt:
You are a forensic voice analyst for personal brands. Study these writing samples and reverse-engineer my voice:

[PAST POSTS]

My field: [NICHE]

Do NOT summarize the content. Extract the PATTERNS. Work through:
1. Sentence rhythm (short vs long, fragments, line-break habits)
2. Vocabulary tics and signature phrases I actually reuse
3. Point of view and recurring beliefs
4. How I open and how I close
5. Words/cliches I clearly avoid

OUTPUT FORMAT - a reusable VOICE PROFILE, copy-pasteable so I can load it before any future draft:
- TONE: 3 adjectives
- RHYTHM: one rule
- SIGNATURE MOVES: 4 bullets
- BANNED PHRASES: 6 items
- SAMPLE: a 40-word post in my voice on a generic topic

Return only the profile, nothing else.

Title: Scroll-Stopping Hook Lab: 12 Hooks, Ranked
Teaser: Generates 12 ranked opening hooks engineered to survive LinkedIn's 'see more' cutoff and earn the click before anyone reads the body.
PromptHint: Put your post idea or takeaway in [POST IDEA]. Set [AUDIENCE] to who you want to stop.
Prompt:
Act as a LinkedIn hook strategist who has studied thousands of viral posts. My post idea: [POST IDEA]. My audience: [AUDIENCE].

The only job of a hook is to win the click before the 'see more' fold (~2 lines, ~140 chars). Generate 12 distinct opening hooks using these formulas, labeling each: contrarian take, specific number, confession, before/after, callout question, false-belief, mini-story cold open, stakes, curiosity gap, 'I was wrong', pattern-interrupt, bold promise.

RULES: no hashtags, no emojis, no clickbait you can't pay off, max 140 chars each, plain human language.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. A numbered list of 12 hooks, each prefixed with its formula label.
2. A 'TOP 3' section ranking the strongest by stop-power, each with one line on why it works.

Return only that.

Title: Founder Story Mine: 10 Postable Angles From Your Path
Teaser: Interviews you about your career, then mines 10 specific, postable founder-story angles with hooks so you never stare at a blank page again.
PromptHint: Drop a short bio or your journey in [MY STORY]. The AI will ask before writing.
Prompt:
You are a personal-brand ghostwriter who finds the story angles founders can't see in themselves. My background: [MY STORY]. My current focus: [WHAT I DO NOW].

STEP 1: Ask me up to 4 sharp clarifying questions, one at a time, about turning points, failures, and beliefs I hold that others disagree with. Wait for each answer before the next question.

STEP 2: Produce a STORY BANK of 10 post angles. Prioritize specific moments over generic advice. No motivational-poster cliches.

OUTPUT FORMAT - a numbered table with columns: Angle (1 line) | Hook (under 140 chars) | Lesson for my audience | Emotional driver (vulnerability / contrarian / aspiration / etc).

Do not write full posts yet - just the bank.

Title: Post-to-Carousel Converter: 8 Swipeable Slides
Teaser: Restructures any text post, blog, or transcript into a swipeable LinkedIn carousel with one idea per slide, a hook cover, and a save-worthy CTA.
PromptHint: Paste the source in [SOURCE CONTENT]. Set [SLIDES] (default 8) and [GOAL] like saves or DMs.
Prompt:
You are a LinkedIn carousel designer. Convert this source into a high-dwell-time document carousel:

[SOURCE CONTENT]

Slides: [SLIDES]. Goal: [GOAL].

RULES: one idea per slide, max ~20 words of body text per slide, conversational not corporate, each slide must pull the reader to swipe. Slide 1 is a pure hook (a promise or tension, no logo dump). The final slide is a clear CTA aligned to the goal.

OUTPUT FORMAT, per slide:
- SLIDE N
- HEADLINE: (max 7 words)
- BODY: (max 20 words)
- VISUAL NOTE: (what to show)

Then a 'CAPTION' section: the LinkedIn post caption (hook + 1 line + CTA) that ships alongside the carousel.

Title: Contrarian Angle Finder: Turn News Into Authority
Teaser: Takes any industry news or trend and spins 5 thoughtful contrarian takes that position you as a sharp thinker, not another reaction-poster.
PromptHint: Paste the news/trend in [NEWS]. Set [MY POV] so the takes stay true to what you believe.
Prompt:
Act as a sharp industry commentator known for nuanced contrarian takes. News or trend in my space: [NEWS]. My honest stance: [MY POV]. My audience: [AUDIENCE].

Most people will post the obvious reaction. I want angles that make smart people stop and think. Generate 5 contrarian-but-defensible takes. The reasoning must be genuinely logical, not edgy-for-clicks. Flag any take that's too risky for my reputation.

OUTPUT FORMAT - a numbered list; for each take:
- TAKE: the headline position (1 line)
- WHY IT HOLDS: 2-3 lines of real reasoning
- WHO DISAGREES: 1 line
- HOOK: under 140 chars
- RISK: low / medium / high

Return only the list.

Title: Profile Magnet: Headline + About That Converts
Teaser: Rewrites your headline and About section into a positioning statement that says who you help, how, and why you, in seconds of attention.
PromptHint: Paste your current headline + About in [CURRENT PROFILE]. Add [WHO I HELP] and [OUTCOME].
Prompt:
You are a personal-brand positioning strategist. Rewrite my LinkedIn profile to convert visitors into followers and inbound.

Current profile: [CURRENT PROFILE]
Who I help: [WHO I HELP]
The outcome I deliver: [OUTCOME]

No buzzword soup (no 'passionate', 'results-driven', 'synergy'). Sound like a real human.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. HEADLINE: 3 options under 220 chars, each leading with the outcome I create, not just my job title.
2. ABOUT: a first-person rewrite that opens with a hook line, states who I help + how + proof, shows personality, ends with a clear next step. Short paragraphs, white space.
3. FIX LIST: 3 specific things my old version got wrong.

Return only those three sections.

Title: Brutally Honest Personal-Brand Audit (No Flattery)
Teaser: Roasts your LinkedIn presence with zero sycophancy, exposes the blind spots killing your reach, then hands you a fix for each.
PromptHint: Paste your headline, bio, and 2-3 recent posts in [MY BRAND]. Brace yourself, then read the fixes.
Prompt:
Act as a brutally honest personal-brand consultant. No flattery, no hedging, no 'great start!' filler. My LinkedIn presence:

[MY BRAND]

Goal I'm chasing: [GOAL]

Be specific and fair, not cruel for sport. Quote my own words back to me where they're failing. This is feedback on my content, not a personal attack.

OUTPUT FORMAT, in 3 parts:
1. THE ROAST: 5 specific things that are weak, generic, or invisible about how I show up, said plainly.
2. WHY IT'S COSTING ME: for each, connect the flaw to lost reach, trust, or inbound.
3. THE FIX: for each roast, one concrete action I can take this week.

End with 'START HERE:' and the single highest-leverage change first.

Title: 30-Day LinkedIn Calendar: Post Daily Without Burnout
Teaser: Builds a full month of LinkedIn posts across proven formats so you can post consistently without burning out or repeating yourself.
PromptHint: Set [NICHE], [AUDIENCE], and [GOAL]. Optional: list 2-3 themes you want to own.
Prompt:
You are a LinkedIn content strategist building a sustainable posting system. My niche: [NICHE]. Audience: [AUDIENCE]. Goal: [GOAL]. Pillars I want to own: [THEMES].

Design a 30-day calendar (assume ~5 posts/week, 20 posts total) that mixes formats so my feed never feels repetitive: story, contrarian take, how-to/list, personal lesson, client/result proof, hot-topic comment, behind-the-scenes, engagement question. Balance value vs personal posts roughly 70/30. No generic motivational fluff.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. A table with columns: Day | Format | Pillar | Working Title | Hook (under 140 chars) | Goal-aligned CTA.
2. A 'WEEKLY HABIT' line: the one routine that makes this repeatable.

Return only the table and that line.

Title: Viral Post Rewriter: Steal the Structure, Not the Words
Teaser: Feeds the AI proven viral posts plus your raw idea and outputs an optimized post that borrows the winning structure in your own voice.
PromptHint: Paste 2-3 viral posts in [EXAMPLES] and your rough idea in [MY IDEA]. Add [VOICE] notes.
Prompt:
You are a viral-content engineer. Study the structural DNA of these high-performing posts, then apply it to my idea.

EXAMPLE VIRAL POSTS:
[EXAMPLES]

MY RAW IDEA:
[MY IDEA]

My voice/constraints: [VOICE]

Never copy the examples' wording or topic. Keep my post 100% original and in my voice. Requirements for the post: a hook under 140 chars, short scannable lines with white space, one clear takeaway, a CTA.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. WHY THEY WORKED: 3 bullets on hook pattern, structure, rhythm, payoff.
2. MY POST: the full draft applying that structure to my idea.
3. ALT HOOKS: 2 alternate hooks for A/B testing.

Return only those three sections.

Title: Comment Engine: Get Noticed in Other People's Threads
Teaser: Writes thoughtful, value-add comments on other people's posts that build relationships and visibility, not empty 'Great post!' noise.
PromptHint: Paste the post you want to comment on in [THE POST]. Set [MY ANGLE] for what you can add.
Prompt:
Act as a relationship-driven LinkedIn networker. I want to comment on this post to build a real connection and get noticed by the author's audience:

[THE POST]

My expertise / angle: [MY ANGLE]

RULES: every comment must add value or perspective, 1-3 sentences, sound like a peer not a fan, no 'Great post!', no obvious self-promotion, no emojis unless natural.

OUTPUT FORMAT - 4 labeled comment options, each a different style:
1. INSIGHT: add a specific insight or counterpoint
2. EXPERIENCE: a brief relevant example from my work
3. QUESTION: a genuinely interesting follow-up question
4. EXTEND: a 'here's what most people miss' angle

Return only the 4 labeled options.

Title: Brain Dump to Post: Messy Thoughts, Polished Draft
Teaser: Turns your messy voice-note or rough thoughts into a structured, ready-to-publish LinkedIn post that still sounds authentically human.
PromptHint: Paste your raw, unedited thoughts in [BRAIN DUMP]. Add [VOICE] notes if you have a tone in mind.
Prompt:
You are a LinkedIn ghostwriter who turns raw thinking into publishable posts without sanding off the human edges. My unfiltered brain dump:

[BRAIN DUMP]

Voice notes: [VOICE]

Don't add ideas I didn't have; sharpen what's there. Find the single strongest insight buried in this and build the post around it: hook (under 140 chars) -> short setup -> the insight -> one concrete example or proof -> a takeaway line -> a soft CTA. Use short lines and white space for mobile.

HARD RULES: no corporate jargon, no em-dash overuse, no 'In today's fast-paced world', no fake enthusiasm.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. THE POST: the final draft only.
2. CUT NOTE: one line on what you removed and why.

Return only those two.

Title: Authority Positioning Map: Own a Lane Nobody Else Has
Teaser: Diagnoses where you're a generalist and carves out a specific, ownable thought-leadership lane with the exact topics to post about.
PromptHint: Describe your skills and audience in [ABOUT ME]. List competitors/peers in [PEERS] if known.
Prompt:
Act as a thought-leadership positioning strategist. Most people sound like everyone else in their field. Help me own a lane.

About me (skills, experience, interests): [ABOUT ME]
Who I want to reach: [AUDIENCE]
Peers/competitors already posting in my space: [PEERS]

Be specific to me, not generic advice.

OUTPUT FORMAT, labeled sections:
1. POSITIONING GAPS: 3 under-claimed angles that are credible for me.
2. MY LANE: pick the strongest, write 'I help [who] do [what] by [unique angle].'
3. CONTENT PILLARS: 4 recurring themes, each with 3 example post topics.
4. THE WEDGE: the one contrarian belief I should plant my flag on.

Return only those sections.

Title: One Win, One Week: 7 Posts From a Single Result
Teaser: Takes a single client result, lesson, or milestone and multiplies it into 7 distinct posts across angles so one story fuels a whole week.
PromptHint: Describe the win/result/lesson in [THE WIN]. Set [AUDIENCE] and [GOAL] for the week.
Prompt:
You are a content-repurposing strategist. I have one strong asset and want maximum mileage without sounding repetitive. The asset: [THE WIN]. Audience: [AUDIENCE]. This week's goal: [GOAL].

Produce 7 distinct posts, each viewing the same story through a different lens: (1) the result/proof, (2) the mistake before the win, (3) the contrarian lesson, (4) a how-to breakdown, (5) the emotional/behind-the-scenes moment, (6) a myth this disproves, (7) a question that invites the audience's take. No two hooks may feel similar.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
1. A table: Day | Angle | Hook (under 140 chars) | 2-line body sketch | CTA.
2. A 'POST FIRST' line naming which to publish first and why.

Return only the table and that line.

Title: Featured Section Fixer: Turn Profile Visits Into Leads
Teaser: Rebuilds your pinned post and Featured section into a deliberate conversion funnel that turns curious profile visitors into followers, replies, and inbound.
PromptHint: Describe your offer and best content in [MY ASSETS]. Add [WHO I HELP] and [DESIRED ACTION].
Prompt:
Act as a LinkedIn conversion strategist. Most people leave their pinned post and Featured section to chance, wasting their highest-intent traffic: people who clicked through to the profile. Fix that.

What I've got (offer, lead magnet, best posts, results, links): [MY ASSETS]
Who I help: [WHO I HELP]
The one action I want a visitor to take: [DESIRED ACTION]

Design a deliberate funnel for the top of my profile.

OUTPUT FORMAT, labeled sections:
1. PINNED POST: a copy-ready post (hook under 140 chars + body + CTA) that frames who I help and points to [DESIRED ACTION].
2. FEATURED LINEUP: 3-4 Featured items in priority order, each with a one-line click-worthy title and why it earns that slot.
3. THE PATH: the exact journey a visitor should take from headline -> pinned post -> Featured -> [DESIRED ACTION], in 4 steps.
4. ONE LEAK: the single biggest thing currently losing me visitors, and the fix.

Return only those sections.
